summary: Iteration 87 - Free Plan for Cooperatives Testing Complete. Backend: 16/17 tests passed (1 skipped - my-subscription returns 403 for admin user as expected). Frontend: Homepage PricingSection shows 'Gratuit' card with all features, no old prices (50000/120000/250000 FCFA), no trial mentions. FAQ page shows '100% gratuit' for cooperatives. Cooperative Dashboard has no SubscriptionBanner, REDD+/SSRTE widgets visible, Export PDF button enabled with gold styling, Quick Actions shows MRV REDD+ and SSRTE/ICI links. Fixed bug in MRVDashboard.jsx where setSubscriptionBlocked was called but state was never defined.

issues: Console warning: Cannot update component while rendering different component (React setState warning) - cosmetic, page still works

PASS: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard-kpis returns all features=True (dashboard_complet, redd_avance, export_pdf_excel, etc.)
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard-charts returns redd_monthly, ssrte_monthly, risk_by_zone without gating
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/pdf/dashboard-report returns 200 PDF (no subscription check)
PASS: Homepage PricingSection shows single 'Gratuit' card with all features
PASS: Homepage PricingSection has NO mention of 50000/120000/250000 FCFA prices
PASS: Homepage PricingSection has NO mention of '6 mois essai gratuit' or 'trial'
PASS: Homepage CTASection has NO mention of '6 mois essai gratuit'
PASS: FAQ page 'Combien coute GreenLink' answer says '100% gratuit' not subscription prices
PASS: FAQ page has NO mention of 'Starter', 'Enterprise' plans
PASS: Cooperative Dashboard has NO SubscriptionBanner visible
PASS: Cooperative Dashboard shows REDD+ widget (empty state when no data)
PASS: Cooperative Dashboard shows SSRTE widget (empty state when no data)
PASS: Cooperative Dashboard PDF export button is enabled with gold styling
PASS: QuickActionsPanel shows MRV REDD+ and SSRTE/ICI links (always visible)
FIXED: MRVDashboard.jsx - removed subscription check that used undefined setSubscriptionBlocked state
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 87 verified that all cooperative subscription plans (Trial, Starter, Pro, Enterprise) have been replaced with a single 'Gratuit' free plan. All features are now enabled for all cooperatives. The PricingSection on homepage shows a single free plan card. SubscriptionBanner was removed from Dashboard. REDDWidget and SSRTEWidget no longer have locked states. PDF export has no subscription gating. Fixed MRVDashboard.jsx subscription check bug.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
